name: Pizza Di Napoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the red peppers on a cookie sheet. Broil 2 to 3 inches from the heat until all sides are blackened, about 10 minutes.
2. Place the peppers in a paper bag; let cool. Seed and cut into strips.
3. Reduce oven temperature to 450°F. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a skillet.
4. Add garlic; cook until fragrant. Add spinach; cook and stir until wilted. Remove from pan.
5. Heat remaining oil in the skillet. Add onions; cook until they begin to brown.
6. Add water; cover and simmer over low heat until onions are limp, about 15 minutes. Remove the lid and continue cooking until all water has evaporated.
7. For each pizza, place the cooked onions on a bread shell. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup cheese.
8. Arrange spinach mixture and red pepper strips on the shell in alternating rows. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup cheese and black pepper.
9. Place on a cookie sheet. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
